ModMetaData.name: Leaf Like Life (Continued)
ModMetaData.author: Neceros
ModMetaData.description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/buuPQel.png[/img] Update of Neceros mod https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2024017049
[img]https://i.imgur.com/pufA0kM.png[/img]
[table] [tr][td][url=https://dsc.gg/mlie][img]https://i.imgur.com/zdzzBrc.png[/img][/url][/td] [td][url=https://github.com/emipa606/LeafLikeLife][img]https://i.imgur.com/kTkpTOE.png[/img][/url][/td] [/tr] [tr] [td][img]https://i.imgur.com/WjDSfUn.png[/img][/td] [td][img]https://i.imgur.com/h5VwTNL.png[/img][/td] [/tr] [/table]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/Z4GOv8H.png[/img] Smokeleaf, but like real life. Rebalances smokeleaf so it's more immersive: slightly less addictive, and far less cancer prone. Set all of the values to your own tastes in the settings menu.
[img]https://i.imgur.com/g69KRUw.png[/img]
[h1]Smokeleaf changes[/h1] [b]Note[/b]: [i]The following changes can be customized in the mod settings[/i]
[list] [*] Consciousness penalty reduced from 30% to 15% [*] Customize the movement, sleepiness, and hunger penalties [*] Half as addictive [*] Asthma chance decreased by half [*] Carcinoma chance decreased by three-quarters [*] Withdrawal mood penalty reduced from -22 to -8 [/list]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/s3KRLlu.gif[/img]
[b]My mods:[/b] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/TheBigN/myworkshopfiles/?appid=294100&p=1&numperpage=30][img]https://i.imgur.com/MD0xY84.png[/img][/url]
[i]MIT License; Copyright (c) 2020 Billy Barnes[/i]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/PwoNOj4.png[/img] [list] [*] See if the the error persists if you just have this mod and its requirements active. [*] If not, try adding your other mods until it happens again. [*] Post your error-log using [url=https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=818773962]HugsLib[/url] or the standalone [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2873415404]Uploader[/url] and command Ctrl+F12 [*] For best support, please use the Discord-channel for error-reporting. [*] Do not report errors by making a discussion-thread, I get no notification of that. [*] If you have the solution for a problem, please post it to the GitHub repository. [*] Use [url=https://github.com/RimSort/RimSort/releases/latest]RimSort[/url] to sort your mods [/list]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3426212097][img]https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/emipa606/LeafLikeLife?label=latest%20version&style=plastic&color=9f1111&labelColor=black[/img][/url] | tags: rebalance
